title: OACP Integrity
description: Per-message integrity, hash chain, and signature. Per §3e.

canonicalization.description: Required at OACP-Regulated; implied by transport binding at lower profiles.

payloadHash.description: Hash of canonical-serialized payload only. Algorithm-prefixed.

envelopeHash.description: Hash of canonical-serialized envelope excluding the entire integrity block.

previousMessageHash.description: envelopeHash of the prior message in the run-scoped chain. Absent for INITIATOR.

parentMessageHashes.description: Optional per-parent hashes for FAN_IN. Keys MUST match causation.causationIds.
